zh.Laxfield, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可拉可費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Fiske於1445年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德時，她的父親William Fiske45歲，母親Joan Lynne19歲。她於大約1457年與Robert Davy在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年2月28日在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 艾德蒙達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Fiske was born in 1445, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Fiske, was 45 and her mother, Joan Lynne, was 19. She married Robert Davy about 1457, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 February 1505, in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Fiske est née en 1445, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Fiske, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Joan Lynne, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Davy environ 1457, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 février 1505, à Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Fiske 1445 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Fiske 45 und ihre Mutter Joan Lynne 19. Sie hat um 1457 in England Robert Davy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Februar 1505 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Church of All Saints, Laxfield, Mid Suff: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.Bury St Edmunds, St Edmundsbury Borough,: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 에드먼드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fiske(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Fiske(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Lynne(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1457년 영국에서 Robert Davy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 에드먼드'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fiske nasceu em 1445, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Fiske, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan Lynne, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Davy aproximadamente 1457, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1505, em Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of All Saints, Laxfield, Mid Suff: алл сеинц' чурч, лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Bury St Edmunds, St Edmundsbury Borough,: ст эдмунд'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Fiske родилась в 1445 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Fiske было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Lynne, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Davy около 1457 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 февраля 1505 г. в местности хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности ст эдмунд'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Church of All Saints, Laxfield, Mid Suff: All Saints' Church, Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Bury St Edmunds, St Edmundsbury Borough,: St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Fiske nació en 1445, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Fiske, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Joan Lynne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Robert Davy aproximadamente 1457, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1505, en Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en St Edmund's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
